content.problemStatement: You are given a sequence A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč and an integer XXX. The weirdness of a contiguous subsequence Al,Al+1,‚Ä¶,ArA_l, A_{l+1}, \ldots, A_rAl‚Äč,Al+1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,Ar‚Äč is defined as W(l,r)=‚ąĎi=lrAi‚čÖXi‚ąílW(l, r) = \sum_{i=l}^r A_i \cdot X^{i-l}W(l,r)=‚ąĎi=lr‚ÄčAi‚Äč‚čÖXi‚ąíl. Find P=‚ąŹi=1N‚ąŹj=iNW(i,j)2P = \prod_{i=1}^N \prod_{j=i}^N W(i, j)^2P=‚ąŹi=1N‚Äč‚ąŹj=iN‚ÄčW(i,j)2 modulo 998,244,353998,244,353998,244,353.
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and XXX.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer PPP modulo 998,244,353998,244,353998,244,353.
